ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Type of permit (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Type of work (e.g., new construction, renovation) */,
  "permit_location" TEXT /* Location of the permit */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "work_description" TEXT /* Description of the work being done */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permit (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the permit expires */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "permit_fee" REAL /* Fee for the permit */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee for the permit */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the permit (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "folder_owners" (
  "folder_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder owner */,
  "folder_owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder owner */,
  "folder_owner_addrhouse" TEXT /* House number of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_addrstreet" TEXT /* Street name of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_addrstreettype" TEXT /* Street type of the folder owner's address (e.g., LN, CV, RD) */,
  "folder_owner_addrunittype" TEXT /* Unit type of the folder owner's address (e.g., apt, suite) */,
  "folder_owner_addrunit" TEXT /* Unit number of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_addrcity" TEXT /* City of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_addrprovince" TEXT /* Province of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_addrpostal" TEXT /* Postal code of the folder owner's address */,
  "folder_owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the folder owner */,
  "folder_owner_email" TEXT /* Email of the folder owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "property_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "property_owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "property_owner_addrhouse" TEXT /* House number of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_addrstreet" TEXT /* Street name of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_addrstreettype" TEXT /* Street type of the property owner's address (e.g., LN, CV, RD) */,
  "property_owner_addrunittype" TEXT /* Unit type of the property owner's address (e.g., apt, suite) */,
  "property_owner_addrunit" TEXT /* Unit number of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_addrcity" TEXT /* City of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_addrprovince" TEXT /* Province of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_addrpostal" TEXT /* Postal code of the property owner's address */,
  "property_owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property owner */,
  "property_owner_email" TEXT /* Email of the property owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "permit_number" TEXT /* Permit number associated with the project */,
  "total_existing_bldg_footage" REAL /* Total existing building footprint of the project */,
  "total_new_add_footage" REAL /* Total new additional footage of the project */,
  "total_valuation_remodel" REAL /* Total valuation of the remodel */,
  "total_job_valuation" REAL /* Total valuation of the job */,
  "remodel_repair_footage" REAL /* Remodel and repair footage */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units in the project */,
  "usage_category" TEXT /* Usage category of the project (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "legal_description" TEXT /* Legal description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_permit_number FOREIGN KEY ("permit_number") REFERENCES permits ("permit_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_email" TEXT /* Email of the inspector */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "contractor_addrhouse" TEXT /* House number of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_addrstreet" TEXT /* Street name of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_addrstreettype" TEXT /* Street type of the contractor's address (e.g., LN, CV, RD) */,
  "contractor_addrunittype" TEXT /* Unit type of the contractor's address (e.g., apt, suite) */,
  "contractor_addrunit" TEXT /* Unit number of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_addrcity" TEXT /* City of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_addrprovince" TEXT /* Province of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_addrpostal" TEXT /* Postal code of the contractor's address */,
  "contractor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contractor */,
  "contractor_email" TEXT /* Email of the contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contractors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the contractor */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Contractor ID */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contractor in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_folder_owners" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the folder owner */,
  "folder_owner_id" INTEGER /* Folder owner ID */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the folder owner in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "folder_owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_property_owners" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the property owner */,
  "property_owner_id" INTEGER /* Property owner ID */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the property owner in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "property_owner_id")
)
